Petition For (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Suport Trust; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Suport Trust; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Continued To Feb-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Oleg Cross, Esq., counsel for Ellen Kemp, Petitioner (appearing by video conference); Basil Boutris, Esq., counsel for Sarah Burbidge, Trustee (appearing by video conference)

The Court initially queries counsel as to the viability of settlement. Mr. Cross notes outstanding issues regarding the Trustee's authority whereas Mr. Boutris notes no accounting for funds previously distributed to Petitioner. Mr. Cross notes that the funds previously gifted to his client, Petitioner herein, were given to her many years ago and that all financial documentation has been provided to Mr. Boutris.

The Court queries Mr. Cross as to the want of notice to certain beneficiaries. Mr. Cross advises that a supplemental declaration filed last week addresses the matter. As the Court and Probate Examiner will want to review the same and as the Court would like time to consider the efficacy of pro bono mediation, the Court continues the matter to February 28, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Dillingham. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
